title: VeridianCopy
description: Easily copy messages from Minecraft chat to the clipboard by one click!
body:
### This mod will allow you to copy messages from Minecraft chat with one click.

If you need to save a large amount of information, for example, the coordinates of the portal sent to chat, then with the help of this mod you will be able to do this. You just need to click by the message you want to copy, and voila! The message will be immediately saved to the clipboard.
